title: World Cup contenders: Are Morocco ready to go all the way this time?
original_text:
The Atlas Lions aim to better their historic 2022 semifinal appearance but have had a chaotic run-in.

The FIFA World Cup begins on June 11. You can follow the action on Al Jazeera’s dedicated World Cup 2026 page with all the latest news, match build-up and live text commentary, and
